title: China-to-Belize Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
provenance: AI-compiled, multi-model cross-checked, not human-verified. Informational only; confirm with the official regulator and a qualified professional. Not legal/certification/customs/market-access advice.

rows.requirement: EMC and Power Quality - 60 Hz Harmonics, FCC/UL Project Expectations, and BEL Review
rows.target_requirement: Belize has not been confirmed to operate a standalone public mandatory EMC certification scheme specifically for PV inverters. In practice, EMC and power-quality evidence for Belize grid-tied PV inverter projects should be aligned with BEL/PUC interconnection review and Americas project practice. Relevant evidence can include IEEE 1547 power-quality performance, UL 1741 certification scope, FCC Part 15 EMC evidence where communications or electronic equipment scope is relevant, and IEC 62920 / IEC 61000-series EMC reports where requested by the project owner. Because Belize is 60 Hz, harmonic and conducted-emission behavior should be checked at the intended 60 Hz voltage configuration rather than relying on China 50 Hz results.
target_standards: IEEE 1547-2018 - distributed energy resource interconnection and power-quality requirements
UL 1741 - inverter and interconnection equipment certification scope, including grid support functions where applicable
FCC Part 15 - radio-frequency device EMC requirements where equipment scope applies
IEC 62920 - Photovoltaic power generating systems - EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment
IEC 61000 series - EMC and harmonic/current-emission test methods where requested by project specification
rows.china_equivalent: China PV inverter EMC evidence is commonly generated under GB/T 37408 and related domestic test methods at CNAS-accredited laboratories. That evidence may include conducted and radiated emission, immunity, and power-quality checks under Chinese grid assumptions. It does not by itself prove FCC Part 15 relevance, UL 1741 project acceptance, IEEE 1547 power-quality compliance, or 60 Hz harmonic performance for Belize's NEMA-style distribution system.
china_standards: GB/T 37408-2021 - 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters) - includes domestic EMC and power-quality provisions
NB/T 32004-2018 - 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
rows.gap: Gap: GB/T 37408 EMC reports should be supplemented with project-accepted EMC and power-quality evidence for Belize. For grid-tied equipment, confirm with BEL and the project engineer whether IEEE 1547 power-quality data, UL 1741 certification, FCC Part 15 reports, IEC 62920, or IEC 61000 reports are required. Retest or technically justify harmonic and conducted-emission behavior at 60 Hz / 110-220 V if prior evidence was generated at China 50 Hz / 220-380 V settings.

mandatory_status.target: Project-dependent: EMC and power-quality evidence is mandatory where BEL/PUC, the project owner, lender, EPC, or procurement specification requires it; 60 Hz validation is a practical grid-connection requirement
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary or project-based for many China PV inverter EMC certificates; China domestic EMC evidence is not a Belize market-access substitute

rows.verdict: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat Chinese GB/T 37408 EMC evidence as background only for Belize. Confirm BEL/PUC and project-owner expectations for IEEE 1547 power quality, UL 1741 scope, FCC Part 15, IEC 62920, or IEC 61000 evidence, and validate harmonic behavior at 60 Hz / 110-220 V. Do not rely on 50 Hz China EMC reports as automatic Belize acceptance.

rows.requirement: BEL / PUC Grid Interconnection - 60 Hz, 110/220 V NEMA System, IEEE 1547 and UL 1741 Direction
rows.target_requirement: Belize Electricity Limited (BEL) is the electricity utility that reviews physical grid connection, while the Public Utilities Commission (PUC) is the statutory utility regulator. For grid-tied PV inverters, exporters should treat Belize as a 60 Hz Americas/Caribbean interconnection market. The practical baseline is BEL/PUC project review using Belize's 110/220 V, 60 Hz grid, US-heritage NEMA distribution equipment, and likely references to IEEE 1547 interconnection requirements and UL 1741 inverter certification. Belize also imports power from Mexico's CFE, so anti-islanding, voltage/frequency ride-through, and reconnection settings should be confirmed for the interconnected 60 Hz grid context. No public BEL/PUC document has been confirmed that automatically accepts Chinese GB/T inverter certificates for PV grid-tie approval.
target_standards: Public Utilities Commission Act (Belize) - PUC statutory utility regulation authority
BEL project-specific grid interconnection and connection agreement requirements
IEEE 1547-2018 - Standard for Interconnection and Interoperability of Distributed Energy Resources with Associated Electric Power Systems Interfaces
UL 1741 - Inverters, Converters, Controllers and Interconnection System Equipment for Use With Distributed Energy Resources
Belize grid parameters - 110/220 V, 60 Hz, US-heritage NEMA distribution context
rows.china_equivalent: Chinese grid-tie inverter evidence commonly includes GB/T 37408-2021 or GB/T 37408-2019, NB/T 32004, GB/T 19964-2024 for PV power-station interconnection, and domestic anti-islanding or protection test reports. These documents are based on China's 220/380 V, 50 Hz grid. They are useful design background but do not demonstrate 60 Hz anti-islanding, IEEE 1547 ride-through behavior, UL 1741 certification, or Belize 110/220 V NEMA distribution compatibility.
china_standards: GB/T 37408-2021 - 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004-2018 - 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 19964-2024 - 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
rows.gap: Critical gap: both frequency and voltage differ. China evidence validated at 50 Hz / 220-380 V does not transfer to Belize's 60 Hz / 110-220 V system. Exporters should obtain or prepare IEEE 1547 and UL 1741 evidence for the specific model, validate anti-islanding and ride-through functions at 60 Hz, document firmware country-code settings, confirm neutral/grounding and NEMA distribution compatibility, and obtain BEL/PUC project acceptance before shipment or energisation. Do not frame Belize as an EN 50549, VDE, or Europe-style 50 Hz interconnection market.

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice for grid-tied PV projects: BEL/PUC interconnection acceptance is required before energisation; 60 Hz grid-protection validation is a technical gate
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese GB/T grid certificates satisfy China domestic grid review only and are not transferable to Belize BEL/PUC interconnection acceptance

rows.verdict: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964 evidence does not satisfy Belize grid-tie acceptance by itself. Belize is a 60 Hz / 110-220 V Americas market; validate anti-islanding, ride-through, reconnection, and firmware settings at 60 Hz and prepare IEEE 1547 / UL 1741 evidence for BEL/PUC review. Confirm project-specific requirements with BEL and PUC before procurement.

rows.requirement: Product Safety - IEC 62109 Baseline and UL 1741 / NEMA Americas Project Expectations
rows.target_requirement: The Belize Bureau of Standards (BBS) is the national standards body. No confirmed public BBS mandatory certification route specifically for solar PV inverters has been identified in the provided dataset facts. For Belize PV inverter projects, safety evidence should therefore be confirmed directly with BBS, BEL, PUC, and the project owner. The practical baseline is IEC 62109-1/-2 for PV inverter safety, with UL 1741 often requested in Americas/North American engineering practice because Belize uses a 60 Hz, US-heritage NEMA distribution context. Product safety evidence should cover the exact inverter model, input/output ratings, firmware grid profile, enclosure, environmental rating, and installation configuration being supplied to Belize.
target_standards: Belize Bureau of Standards (BBS) - verify current regulated product and conformity-assessment requirements directly
IEC 62109-1 - Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems - Part 1: General requirements
IEC 62109-2 - Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems - Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters
UL 1741 - Inverters, Converters, Controllers and Interconnection System Equipment for Use With Distributed Energy Resources
NEMA / US-heritage distribution context - installation compatibility and enclosure expectations should be confirmed for the Belize project
rows.china_equivalent: Chinese PV inverter safety evidence commonly includes GB/T 37408 and domestic voluntary CQC/CGC-type testing. That evidence may address electrical safety, markings, environmental conditions, and inverter performance for China's domestic market. It is not equivalent to an IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test certificate or UL 1741 certification accepted in Americas-style project procurement, and it does not by itself prove suitability for Belize's 60 Hz / NEMA installation environment.
china_standards: GB/T 37408-2021 - 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004-2018 - 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
CQC / CGC voluntary PV inverter certification routes in China
rows.gap: Gap: Chinese domestic PV inverter safety reports should be supplemented with IEC 62109-1/-2 evidence and, where requested by BEL, the project owner, lender, or EPC, UL 1741 certification for the specific model. Confirm whether BBS requires any import conformity assessment or regulated-product documentation. Because Belize uses 60 Hz and NEMA-style installations, verify enclosure rating, grounding/neutral arrangements, labels, terminals, disconnects, and installation instructions against the project design rather than relying only on China-market documentation.

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where required by BBS regulated-product scope, BEL/PUC interconnection review, the project owner, lender, EPC, or procurement specification; IEC 62109 and UL 1741 are practical evidence baselines for project acceptance
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary in common China PV inverter certification practice under GB/T 37408 and CQC/CGC routes; not a Belize safety acceptance substitute

rows.verdict: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T 37408 safety evidence alone should not be treated as Belize project acceptance. Prepare IEC 62109-1/-2 safety evidence and confirm whether UL 1741 is required for the specific Belize project. Verify BBS regulated-product scope and BEL/PUC/project-owner safety documentation requirements before shipment.
